title: वायु द्वादश नाम स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री वायु द्वादश नाम स्तोत्रम् ॥

प्रथमं वायुमित्युक्तं द्वितीयं प्राणदायकम्।
तृतीयं मातरिश्वानं चतुर्थं पवनं विदुः॥१॥

पञ्चमं मरुतं नाम षष्ठं अनिलमेव च।
सप्तमं गन्धवाहं च अष्टमं शीघ्रगामिनम्॥२॥

नवमं सर्वगं चैव दशमं प्राणवायुकम्।
एकादशं शब्दवाहिनं द्वादशं तनूनपातम्॥३॥

द्वादशैतानि नामानि वायुदेवस्य कीर्तयेत्।
यः पठेत् प्रातरुत्थाय प्राणशक्तिं लभेत् सदा॥४॥

श्वासरोगो विनश्येत् च बलं वीर्यं च वर्धते।
वायुदेवप्रसादेन दीर्घायुश्च लभेन्नरः॥५॥

॥ इति श्री वायु द्वादश नाम स्तोत्रं सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Vayu Dwadash Nama Stotram ||

Prathamam Vayum-ityuktam Dvitiyam Prana-dayakam.
Tritiyam Matarishvanam Chaturtham Pavanam Viduh.||1||

Panchamam Marutam Nama Shashtham Anilam Eva Cha.
Saptamam Gandha-vaham Cha Ashtamam Shighra-gaminam.||2||

Navamam Sarva-gam Chaiva Dashamam Prana-vayukam.
Ekadasham Shabda-vahinam Dvadasham Tanu-napatam.||3||

Dvadashai-tani Namani Vayu-devasya Kirtayet.
Yah Pathet Pratar-utthaya Prana-shaktim Labhet Sada.||4||

Shvasa-rogo Vinashyet Cha Balam Viryam Cha Vardhate.
Vayu-deva-prasadena Dirghayush-cha Labhen-narah.||5||

|| Iti Shri Vayu Dwadash Nama Stotram Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning: प्रथम नाम वायु, दूसरा प्राणदायक, तीसरा मातरिश्वा, चौथा पवन। पाँचवाँ मरुत, छठा अनिल, सातवाँ गन्धवाह, आठवाँ शीघ्रगामी। नवाँ सर्वग, दसवाँ प्राणवायु, ग्यारहवाँ शब्दवाही, बारहवाँ तनूनपात। वायुदेव के इन बारह नामों का प्रातःकाल पाठ करने से प्राणशक्ति बढ़ती है, श्वासरोग नष्ट होता है, बल-वीर्य वर्धित होता है और दीर्घायु प्राप्त होती है।
benefits: Twelve Vedic names of Lord Vayu for pranashakti enhancement
Associated in tradition with respiratory diseases and breathing disorders
Invokes long life by the grace of vayu deva
Sacred for practitioners of Pranayama and Yoga
description: Among the most cherished prayers to Lord Vayu, Vayu Dwadash Nama Stotram (वायु द्वादश नाम स्तोत्रम्) stands as a devotional hymn of praise. Rooted in Rig Veda, this composition carries deep spiritual significance. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to increase physical strength and vitality as well as cure respiratory diseases and breathing disorders. Additionally, it is known to grant long life by the grace of Vayu Deva. It is especially recommended on Saturday (Shanivar) and Tuesday (Mangalvar) and during Hanuman Jayanti for maximum spiritual benefit. Comprising 5 verses, it can be completed in approximately 3 minutes, making it suitable for daily devotional practice. On this page, you can read the complete Vayu Dwadash Nama Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Recite Vayu Dwadash Nama - 12 Vedic names of Lord Vayu in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning for respiratory health, strength, and longevity.
